description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small landscaped area with palm trees, and large floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light. The side and rear views reveal a fenced backyard with a green lawn, a swimming pool, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The house is surrounded by a black metal fence and has a combination of concrete, glass, and metal materials throughout its structure. The windows are arranged in large, asymmetrical panels, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The main entryway is set back from the driveway, marked by a simple door and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a driveway, and a fenced backyard with a pool and palm trees. The exterior features a mix of dark and light finishes and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entryway, large windows, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard lawn, pool, black metal fence, and additional palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, pool, outdoor seating, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black facade, rear patio, and more outdoor seating areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door set back from the driveway, no porch, minimal steps, and no decorative columns or overhangs
